one_time_description: ISC cancelled $1,164,307 in deferred funding for the Lagoon project
economic_notes: War Lake Convenience Store Ltd. operates with Video Lottery Terminals onsite. War Lake Hydro Trust Fund relates to Manitoba Hydro negotiations for environmental issues from Keeyask Hydro Electric development on the Nelson River. First Nation has portfolio investments in Missinippi Rail Limited Partnership, Keewatin Railway Corporation, and Cree Nation Partners Limited Partnerships.
notes: Fiscal year is March 31, 2023 (not 2024). Four consolidated entities: War Lake Administration, War Lake Social Services, War Lake Hydro Trust Funds, War Lake Convenience Store Ltd. One-time item: ISC cancelled $1,164,307 of Lagoon project funding. Long-term debt consists entirely of CMHC mortgages for housing projects. Capital lease obligation of $9,187 also exists. Annual debt service calculated as repayment of long-term debt ($142,534) plus capital lease repayments ($26,633) = $169,167. OSR calculated as total revenue minus ISC, CMHC, Solicitor General, and Province of Manitoba transfers. Deferred revenue includes amounts from Keewatin Tribal Council, Manitoba Hydro, and Southeast Resource Development Council. No schedule of remuneration provided in the extracted text.
